title: taraxacum devians
intro: Taraxacum devians, commonly known as the lesser dandelion or false dandelion, is a plant species in the sunflower family with a history of traditional use in herbal medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which are rich in vitamins A and K, potassium, and other minerals. The health benefits of Taraxacum devians include its potential to support liver and digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic, making it a popular remedy for conditions such as jaundice and kidney stones. Taraxacum devians can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
